---
name: Bug report
about: Create a bug report to help us improve NVCF
title: "[NVCF][OSS] <Bug description>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is. 

## Tools version

Which tools versions? (helmfile, helm at a minimum)

## Environment

What is the target environment? (e.g. local cluster, eks etc)

## Services Impact

If the issue relates to a service(s): What tag is it? Do you have any relevant logs excerpts from the pod/container?

## Steps or code to reproduce bug

- What action were you taking when the issue occurred?
- If the issue is with an NVCF function: do you know what function image and function config?

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.

-----
By submitting this issue, you agree to follow our [code of conduct](../../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and our [contributing guidelines](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
